props.ChoiceText: The finest thing your knight ever did for you may have been needing help at the right moment.
props.ChoiceBio: Saving the knight's life taught you how quickly service can become leverage.

0.TransitionText: Because saving the knight's life taught you how quickly service can become leverage, the terms of service changed and knighthood itself became imaginable.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Knight, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because saving the knight's life taught you how quickly service can become leverage, proving steady when lives were at stake led others to trust you with command.
1.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Officer, but you may remain on your current path instead.

2.TargetText: A knight whose life you once saved.
2.TransitionText: Because saving the knight's life taught you how quickly service can become leverage, even that deed kept you bound to rank and its obligations.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Squire, but you may remain on your current path instead.
